description:
Spec: docs/cps-in-clif.md §8.2 compose / §8.3 apply1 — `Term::CallClosure` lowers to `v_code = load f+16; return_call_indirect sig, v_code(args..., f, k)`. No stub.

Work:
- In src/ir_codegen.rs at the native-path terminator dispatch (currently panics with "Term::CallClosure reached from native-fn body — natively_callable invariant violated" near line 3683/3727):
  - Term::CallClosure: factor cont-closure construction from uniform path (line ~3578), build cont closure with synthetic outer_cont + Tagged user captures, then `return_call_indirect Tail` with sig `(args..., self, cont) i64 -> i64 tail` through `load cl+16`. Pass cl as self, cf as cont.
  - Term::TailCallClosure: same shape but pass the caller's own cont (from `cont_param` SSA or, for entry of a closure-target shape, the explicit cont param). No new cont closure built.
- Update uniform-path Term::CallClosure (line 3578) to also emit the Tail-CC return_call_indirect path. Uniform fns themselves are SystemV — they cannot `return_call` Tail-CC. Either:
  (a) defer uniform-path rewrite to fz-siu.1.10 (parking-reachable promotion); for now uniform fns retain a temporary helper or assert "this fn must be native after 1.10".
  (b) emit a tail-trampoline: uniform fn builds cont closure, then runtime helper `fz_dispatch_closure` does the Tail-CC dispatch and the uniform fn returns its YIELD sentinel.
- Admit `Term::CallClosure { continuation, .. }` to body_ok in `parking::natively_callable` and ir_codegen's type-aware shrink when continuation.fn_id is in set. Admit `Term::TailCallClosure` unconditionally. Receive admission deferred to fz-siu.1.11.
- Drop `cont_blocked` entries for CallClosure sites in `parking::natively_callable`. CallClosure conts are now native.

Acceptance:
- `higher_order.fz` prints `-10` end-to-end.
- `closure_typed_captures.fz` prints `42` end-to-end.
- Existing §8.1 + §8.4 regression tests stay green.
- Re-enable (un-#[ignore]) `higher_order_compose_matches_cps_in_clif_section_8_2` and `closure_typed_captures_matches_cps_in_clif_section_8_3` in tests/fixture_matrix.rs.
title: fz-cps.1.9: native-path Term::CallClosure / TailCallClosure
